And here I am opening sourcing 𝐕𝐚𝐠𝐝𝐡𝐞𝐧𝐮 - 𝐀 𝐯ṛ𝐭𝐭𝐚 (𝐦𝐞𝐭𝐞𝐫) 𝐚𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐞 ś𝐥𝐨𝐤𝐚-𝐭𝐨-𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐞𝐱𝐭-𝐭𝐨-𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐞𝐜𝐡 https://t.co/kHoLP7DbXe

tweets.full_text:
Chess engines tell you the best move.

But grandmasters are human, they don’t always play it.

So I built "Kibitz": a human move predictor for chess broadcasts. I trained this model on my Nvidia RTX 5080. 

Then I made it run as a business by itself.

A channel buys the overlay, https://t.co/30GqoPPvlE
tweets.summary: 开发者用Nvidia RTX 5080训练国际象棋人类走法预测模型Kibitz，并将其商业化。单产品技术叙事，有创意应用。

tweets.full_text:
My entire AI stack is now Chinese 🇨🇳

87% cheaper. same revenue

swaps by task:

1. reasoning / backend brain
   Opus 4.8 → Kimi K2.7
   benchmark gap: ~8%  ·  price: ~11x cheaper

2. code generation
   GPT-5.5 → Qwen 3.7 Max
   benchmark gap: ~18%  ·  price: ~7x cheaper

3. https://t.co/X1B8ClS7fa
tweets.summary: 工程师用中文AI模型替换全栈，成本降87%收入不变。Kimi K2.7替代Opus（性能差8%便宜11倍），Qwen 3.7替代GPT-5.5（性能差18%便宜7倍）。
angles: 成本降87%！用中文AI模型替换OpenAI全栈方案

tweets.full_text: Advanced Codex users. We shipped a replacement to coarse sandbox modes: reusable, inheritable permission profiles binding OS-enforced file read/write/deny rules (even **/*.env) to per-domain network + Unix sockets. Plus fail-closed admin allowlists. Least privilege per task.
tweets.summary: Codex推出可复用权限配置系统，替代沙箱模式，支持OS级文件/网络访问控制和最小权限原则。面向开发者的安全基础设施更新。
angles: Codex权限系统革新：最小权限原则如何保护开发环境
从沙箱到权限配置：企业级安全基础设施升级
OS级访问控制深度解读：.env文件保护新方案
